requirement.description: The gateway shall aggregate individual door open/close signals and transmit a consolidated door status to the instrument cluster.

test_cases.title: Verify front right door open sets AnyDoorOpen = 1
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; front right door open; monitor CAN ID 0x10E

test_cases.title: Verify rear left door open sets AnyDoorOpen = 1
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; rear left door open; monitor CAN ID 0x10E

test_cases.title: Verify rear right door open sets AnyDoorOpen = 1
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; rear right door open; monitor CAN ID 0x10E

test_cases.title: Verify multiple doors open results in AnyDoorOpen = 1
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; multiple doors open; monitor CAN ID 0x10E
steps: Extract all Door_* and AnyDoorOpen signals

test_cases.title: Verify GW_DoorStatus message DLC
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; CAN monitoring enabled; monitor CAN ID 0x10E

test_cases.title: Verify door status aggregation updates immediately on door state change
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; all doors closed; monitor CAN ID 0x10E
test_cases.expected_result: AnyDoorOpen changes from 0 to 1 in the next message
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_009_immediate_update(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_DOOR_STATUS_ID, 2)
    assert msgs, 'No GW_DoorStatus messages received'
    assert decode_any_door_open(msgs[-1]) in (0, 1)

test_cases.title: Verify GW_DoorStatus stops transmitting when Gateway ECU is powered OFF
test_cases.precondition: Gateway ECU active; monitor CAN ID 0x10E
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_door_010_stop_on_power_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_DOOR_STATUS_ID, 2)
    assert msgs_before, 'No GW_DoorStatus before power off'
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_DOOR_STATUS_ID, 2)
    assert not msgs_after
